predicates.name: proves_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not prove Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen (background status directly assertable from case facts).

predicates.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying Community free movement rights.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person's stay is illegal: they are an alien who does not or no longer meets entry or stay conditions.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

predicates.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
predicates.description: The national authority of the person's country has recognised the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person is an identified alien based on one of the three identification grounds.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for granting international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

predicates.name: risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is established having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: The risk of absconding was established following an individual examination.

predicates.name: at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one objective criterion from paragraph 2 is met for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is current and real, established by individual examination and at least one objective criterion from paragraph 2.

predicates.name: criterion_2_1_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(1) is met: no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or no international protection application within the time limit.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

predicates.name: no_protection_application_within_time_limit
predicates.description: The person has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: criterion_2_2_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(2) is met: use of false information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person has committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The person has used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_2_3_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(3) is met: non-cooperation with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

predicates.name: criterion_2_4_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(4) is met: declared unwillingness or prior failure to comply with a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: criterion_2_5_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(5) is met: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_2_6_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(6) is met: new residence or protection application submitted immediately after a refusal, termination, or removal decision.

predicates.name: new_residence_application_after_refusal_or_termination
predicates.description: The person has submitted a new residence application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating their stay.

predicates.name: new_protection_application_after_refusal_or_termination
predicates.description: The person has submitted a new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating their stay.

predicates.name: new_residence_application_after_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has submitted a new residence application immediately after a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: new_protection_application_after_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has submitted a new application for international protection immediately after a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_2_7_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(7) is met: the person concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting a protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining a protection application.

predicates.name: criterion_2_8_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(8) is met: multiple protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_2_9_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(9) is met: the person concealed having previously submitted a protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: criterion_2_10_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(10) is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

predicates.name: declared_came_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: The person has declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

predicates.name: file_shows_came_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_2_11_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(11) is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
